# Candidate Summary Template

Dung template nay sau khi implement xong va truoc khi user quyet dinh merge/deploy.

```markdown
# Candidate Summary - <phase-or-fix-name>

## Branch And Workspace
- Branch:
- Worktree:
- Base main SHA:

## Scope Delivered
- ...

## Docs Updated
- ...

## Checkpoints
| Checkpoint | Status | Evidence | Notes |
|------------|--------|----------|-------|
| ...        | ...    | ...      | ...   |

## Validation
- Tests/build:
- Production-like smoke:
- Known skips:

## Risks And Open Questions
- ...

## Recommended Decision
- `merge-and-deploy`
- `brainstorm-and-iterate`
- `collect-more-evidence`

## If Merged
- Expected production checks:
- Suggested case pack to rerun:
```
